texts.label: text
texts.orig: Ol Doinyo Lemboro is located in Central Laikipia with the most spectacular variety in landscape. The low-lying land around the Ewaso Narok River is bordered by vibrant ridgelines dotted with ancient dryland forest remnants. In contrast, the plateaus of the western ridges which advertise the edge of the great Rift Valley, form flat grassy plains with brilliant escarpment views.
texts.text: Ol Doinyo Lemboro is located in Central Laikipia with the most spectacular variety in landscape. The low-lying land around the Ewaso Narok River is bordered by vibrant ridgelines dotted with ancient dryland forest remnants. In contrast, the plateaus of the western ridges which advertise the edge of the great Rift Valley, form flat grassy plains with brilliant escarpment views.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Within this 20,000-acre Landscape, Laikipia Expeditions has three camps; Laikipia Wilderness Main Camp, Palm Camp and River Camp. All three Camps are designed to provide an adventurous safari experience while contributing to the local area economically and environmentally. We proudly consider our camps designed for an authentic experience, not luxury.
texts.text: Within this 20,000-acre Landscape, Laikipia Expeditions has three camps; Laikipia Wilderness Main Camp, Palm Camp and River Camp. All three Camps are designed to provide an adventurous safari experience while contributing to the local area economically and environmentally. We proudly consider our camps designed for an authentic experience, not luxury.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Travelling to Laikipia can be done by driving directly from Nairobi for about 5 hours or flying to Nanyuki Airstrip or Loisaba Airstrip where we can collect you. The drive from either airstrip takes about 2 hours. If you would like to charter a flight to camp, our closest small strip is Sosian where we can collect you for a 30-minute drive to camp.
texts.text: Travelling to Laikipia can be done by driving directly from Nairobi for about 5 hours or flying to Nanyuki Airstrip or Loisaba Airstrip where we can collect you. The drive from either airstrip takes about 2 hours. If you would like to charter a flight to camp, our closest small strip is Sosian where we can collect you for a 30-minute drive to camp.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 90% of the Laikipia expedition staff are recruited locally. Exceptional chefs oversee the vegetable and herb garden and purchase local produce which are cooked using a specialised, eco-friendly wood-burning stove or over an open fire using 'elephant-damaged wood'. These skilled chefs produce gorgeous buffet-style meals with a hard-to-beat, camping hint of smoky flavour. All dietary requirements are catered for across all of our small eco-friendly safari camps.
texts.text: 90% of the Laikipia expedition staff are recruited locally. Exceptional chefs oversee the vegetable and herb garden and purchase local produce which are cooked using a specialised, eco-friendly wood-burning stove or over an open fire using 'elephant-damaged wood'. These skilled chefs produce gorgeous buffet-style meals with a hard-to-beat, camping hint of smoky flavour. All dietary requirements are catered for across all of our small eco-friendly safari camps.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: At Laikipia Wilderness, we are proud of our small environmental footprint. We recycle everything possible, using compost and greywater for the garden. Our local community partner turns our empty wine bottles into glasses for use at camp. The products in our small shop are bought from local women's groups. Electricity is exclusively solar and we use digestive systems for waste water.
texts.text: At Laikipia Wilderness, we are proud of our small environmental footprint. We recycle everything possible, using compost and greywater for the garden. Our local community partner turns our empty wine bottles into glasses for use at camp. The products in our small shop are bought from local women's groups. Electricity is exclusively solar and we use digestive systems for waste water.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Central areas of each camp have Wi-Fi that enables access to the rest of the world, we recommend charging heavier batteries in the central areas of the main camp to avoid damaging them, and smaller voltage items are chargeable in the rooms.
texts.text: Central areas of each camp have Wi-Fi that enables access to the rest of the world, we recommend charging heavier batteries in the central areas of the main camp to avoid damaging them, and smaller voltage items are chargeable in the rooms.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We can easily provide directions for self-drive please send us a request and Google Maps now accurately works for our main camp. Our check-out time is 10 am and check-in at 12 pm.
texts.text: We can easily provide directions for self-drive please send us a request and Google Maps now accurately works for our main camp. Our check-out time is 10 am and check-in at 12 pm.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Nestling on a hillside above the Ewaso Narok River, Laikipia Wilderness Camp provides a unique, adventurous safari experience where people prefer to stay longer and enjoy this family-owned camp.
texts.text: Nestling on a hillside above the Ewaso Narok River, Laikipia Wilderness Camp provides a unique, adventurous safari experience where people prefer to stay longer and enjoy this family-owned camp.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The rooms are carefully sited to invite both couples who seek a private, secluded stay and families of all ages. Ajoined tents with a shared bathroom and veranda enable families to keep an eye on little ones, yet soak up the wilderness experience.
texts.text: The rooms are carefully sited to invite both couples who seek a private, secluded stay and families of all ages. Ajoined tents with a shared bathroom and veranda enable families to keep an eye on little ones, yet soak up the wilderness experience.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Six tented rooms complement a central dining area with indoor and outdoor sitting areas giving snug warmth and views of the stunning Laikipia Landscape. Plentiful books and board games enable reference and relaxation. Traditional and beautifully rustic; each bedroom and ensuite bathroom is individually designed using local materials, sustainable soaps and products. Cool, private verandas invite peace and relaxation while you enjoy the vista and the wildlife.
texts.text: Six tented rooms complement a central dining area with indoor and outdoor sitting areas giving snug warmth and views of the stunning Laikipia Landscape. Plentiful books and board games enable reference and relaxation. Traditional and beautifully rustic; each bedroom and ensuite bathroom is individually designed using local materials, sustainable soaps and products. Cool, private verandas invite peace and relaxation while you enjoy the vista and the wildlife.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: On top of a rock above the main camp, a swinging bench offers a 360-degree view of the Laikipia landscape with the impressive skyline of Mount Kenya on clear days. Feel free to grab your book and enjoy the tranquillity of this unique viewpoint. The owner's dogs do live in the main camp helping to make the atmosphere feel like home.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Laikipia Wilderness River Camp (exclusive use only, min 4 adults)
texts.text: Laikipia Wilderness River Camp (exclusive use only, min 4 adults)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Nestled on the serene banks of the Ewaso Narok River, Laikipia Wilderness River Camp embodies the same ethos as our main camp. With familiar staff, guides, catering style, activities, and ambience, it seamlessly extends the unique experience we offer.
texts.text: Nestled on the serene banks of the Ewaso Narok River, Laikipia Wilderness River Camp embodies the same ethos as our main camp. With familiar staff, guides, catering style, activities, and ambience, it seamlessly extends the unique experience we offer.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The camp comprises four cottages, featuring two family cottages and two versatile double, twin, or triple rooms, all equipped with en suite open-air bathrooms. The thatched buildings provide a cool retreat during siesta time, and the sounds of the river create a tranquil backdrop for your stay.
texts.text: The camp comprises four cottages, featuring two family cottages and two versatile double, twin, or triple rooms, all equipped with en suite open-air bathrooms. The thatched buildings provide a cool retreat during siesta time, and the sounds of the river create a tranquil backdrop for your stay.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The heart of the camp boasts a welcoming central mess and dining area, with plenty of space to relax and enjoy. It's an ideal space for larger groups and families seeking an exclusive and immersive wilderness experience.
texts.text: The heart of the camp boasts a welcoming central mess and dining area, with plenty of space to relax and enjoy. It's an ideal space for larger groups and families seeking an exclusive and immersive wilderness experience.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Discover Laikipia Wilderness River Camp, where the soothing sounds of the river harmonise with our commitment to providing an authentic and unforgettable safari adventure.
texts.text: Discover Laikipia Wilderness River Camp, where the soothing sounds of the river harmonise with our commitment to providing an authentic and unforgettable safari adventure.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Laikipia Wilderness Palm Camp (exclusive use only, min 4 adults)
texts.text: Laikipia Wilderness Palm Camp (exclusive use only, min 4 adults)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Our latest addition, Laikipia Wilderness Palm Camp, opened its doors officially in October 2023. This unique camp strikes a perfect balance between our main camp and river camp, featuring six tented en-suite rooms elevated on wooden stilts. The rooms offer a gorgeous perspective of the Ewaso Narok River, each with a private veranda where guests can immerse themselves in the scenic setting of the river.
texts.text: Our latest addition, Laikipia Wilderness Palm Camp, opened its doors officially in October 2023. This unique camp strikes a perfect balance between our main camp and river camp, featuring six tented en-suite rooms elevated on wooden stilts. The rooms offer a gorgeous perspective of the Ewaso Narok River, each with a private veranda where guests can immerse themselves in the scenic setting of the river.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Inside, guests can enjoy the comfort of spacious bedrooms and well-appointed en-suite closed bathrooms with continuous hot and cold running water, ensuring their comfort 24 hours a day. The heart of the camp is the central mess, a welcoming and open-plan space designed for relaxation. Complete with a high bar, comfortable seating, and a dining area, it's an ideal place to connect with friends and family while you relish in the immersive wilderness experience.
texts.text: Inside, guests can enjoy the comfort of spacious bedrooms and well-appointed en-suite closed bathrooms with continuous hot and cold running water, ensuring their comfort 24 hours a day. The heart of the camp is the central mess, a welcoming and open-plan space designed for relaxation. Complete with a high bar, comfortable seating, and a dining area, it's an ideal place to connect with friends and family while you relish in the immersive wilderness experience.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Outside, the expansive lawn provides additional seating areas with views of the river. Laikipia Wilderness Palm Camp gives guests easy access to the Ewaso Narok River, offering a plethora of river activities for those seeking adventure. Whether you fancy fishing or a refreshing swim, the riverside setting provides an idyllic backdrop for these enjoyable pursuits.
texts.text: Outside, the expansive lawn provides additional seating areas with views of the river. Laikipia Wilderness Palm Camp gives guests easy access to the Ewaso Narok River, offering a plethora of river activities for those seeking adventure. Whether you fancy fishing or a refreshing swim, the riverside setting provides an idyllic backdrop for these enjoyable pursuits.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Experience the allure of Laikipia Wilderness Palm Camp, where safari comfort meets the untamed beauty of nature. We invite you to unwind, connect, and create lasting memories along the banks of the Ewaso Narko River.
texts.text: Experience the allure of Laikipia Wilderness Palm Camp, where safari comfort meets the untamed beauty of nature. We invite you to unwind, connect, and create lasting memories along the banks of the Ewaso Narko River.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Tucked away in the heart of a vast, untamed wilderness, Leopard Spings Tented Camp offers an intimate and authentic tented safari experience. This is a place where nature takes centre stage, where the rhythm of the wild sets the pace, and where every moment is steeped in adventure.
texts.text: Tucked away in the heart of a vast, untamed wilderness, Leopard Spings Tented Camp offers an intimate and authentic tented safari experience. This is a place where nature takes centre stage, where the rhythm of the wild sets the pace, and where every moment is steeped in adventure.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Our four spacious, fully furnished tented rooms are designed to ensure comfort for our guests whilst not deterring from the wildness of the Mutara landscape. Guests are provided with the authentic experience of the Kenyan wilderness, from its bird songs to its calling lions, without compromising the comfort expected of an East African tented safari. Our open-air en-suite bathrooms bring a unique symbiosis with the natural beauty of the landscape. Traditional bucket showers warmed upon request, pair perfectly with the soft morning breeze, whilst our modern flush toilets ensure the comforts of home without compromising the camp's classic off-grid appeal.
texts.text: Our four spacious, fully furnished tented rooms are designed to ensure comfort for our guests whilst not deterring from the wildness of the Mutara landscape. Guests are provided with the authentic experience of the Kenyan wilderness, from its bird songs to its calling lions, without compromising the comfort expected of an East African tented safari. Our open-air en-suite bathrooms bring a unique symbiosis with the natural beauty of the landscape. Traditional bucket showers warmed upon request, pair perfectly with the soft morning breeze, whilst our modern flush toilets ensure the comforts of home without compromising the camp's classic off-grid appeal.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The camp is centred around an inviting dining and sitting area, where the essence of the African safari experience comes to life. Our dining area perfectly blends the atmosphere of a family dinner with quality meals, lovingly prepared by our experienced kitchen team, capable of warming any chilly evening! All our home-style meals are prepared with fresh, local produce from trusted suppliers, allowing us to support local communities whilst guaranteeing the quality our guests come to expect. All meals are served buffet style around a central table, where our trained hosts and waiting team are present to ensure all needs are met, allowing conversation, laughter and stories of the day's adventures to flow freely over a drink of choice. Our cosy mess tent accommodates the perfect space for relaxation, while the outdoor fireplace is the ideal setting to finish the evening with drinks and stories under the stars.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Under the expert management of Steve Carey and Graeme Lemon, our camp boasts over sixty years of combined experience in unique, hand-crafted safaris throughout the continent. Our guides are expertly trained and share unbridled passion and knowledge of the natural world. We believe that every adventure is a unique opportunity to connect, to connect with our team under a magical firelit evening or to connect with nature itself, in which we are blessed to be surrounded.
texts.text: Under the expert management of Steve Carey and Graeme Lemon, our camp boasts over sixty years of combined experience in unique, hand-crafted safaris throughout the continent. Our guides are expertly trained and share unbridled passion and knowledge of the natural world. We believe that every adventure is a unique opportunity to connect, to connect with our team under a magical firelit evening or to connect with nature itself, in which we are blessed to be surrounded.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The camp accommodates one large group or, if hosting a couple, a maximum of two groups at a time. This camp does not have access to Giza sightings
texts.text: The camp accommodates one large group or, if hosting a couple, a maximum of two groups at a time. This camp does not have access to Giza sightings

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Laikipia Wilderness Camp (LWC) thrives on the spirit of adventure inherent in the safari experience. We offer you the freedom to explore this remote corner of Africa by car, bike, or on foot, ensuring an immersive encounter with the African wilderness. Our diverse range of activities is adaptable and suited for families and individuals of all ages.
texts.text: Laikipia Wilderness Camp (LWC) thrives on the spirit of adventure inherent in the safari experience. We offer you the freedom to explore this remote corner of Africa by car, bike, or on foot, ensuring an immersive encounter with the African wilderness. Our diverse range of activities is adaptable and suited for families and individuals of all ages.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: At LWC, we take pride in tailoring activities to accommodate both adults and kids, providing a unique outdoor experience in a safe and enriching learning environment. Whether embarking on a game drive, a biking excursion, or a guided walking safari, each adventure is crafted to deliver an unforgettable journey into the heart of the wild, fostering a deep connection with nature and the wonders of the Laikipia landscape. For more information please visit our website.
texts.text: At LWC, we take pride in tailoring activities to accommodate both adults and kids, providing a unique outdoor experience in a safe and enriching learning environment. Whether embarking on a game drive, a biking excursion, or a guided walking safari, each adventure is crafted to deliver an unforgettable journey into the heart of the wild, fostering a deep connection with nature and the wonders of the Laikipia landscape. For more information please visit our website.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● Rafting, swimming, rope swing, and waterfall jumping (when the river permits
texts.text: Rafting, swimming, rope swing, and waterfall jumping (when the river permits

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We would highly recommend a minimum of 4 nights to enable you to enjoy our range of activities. This also allows for one night in the wilderness on a campout. We like to kick this off with a bush dinner cooked on the fire coupled with drinks and stories before climbing into bed. An armed guide will stay with you in camp all night. Bed in this case is a warm cozzie bedroll placed on a stretcher placed on one of our platforms above the ground and the option of sleeping outside or under a cosy roof cover. After a night of truly experiencing the Laikipia bush at night, you wake up to a hot cup of tea or coffee and a light snack before continuing onto a morning activity (walk or game drive).
texts.text: We would highly recommend a minimum of 4 nights to enable you to enjoy our range of activities. This also allows for one night in the wilderness on a campout. We like to kick this off with a bush dinner cooked on the fire coupled with drinks and stories before climbing into bed. An armed guide will stay with you in camp all night. Bed in this case is a warm cozzie bedroll placed on a stretcher placed on one of our platforms above the ground and the option of sleeping outside or under a cosy roof cover. After a night of truly experiencing the Laikipia bush at night, you wake up to a hot cup of tea or coffee and a light snack before continuing onto a morning activity (walk or game drive).

texts.label: text
texts.orig: during periods of long grass/rain or on request we offer campouts on our platforms without the mozzie dome tents rather than on the ground.
texts.text: during periods of long grass/rain or on request we offer campouts on our platforms without the mozzie dome tents rather than on the ground.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The wildlife in Laikipia is extraordinary. The area is still wild and largely unfenced, which enables game to move around the landscape, following the rains. Home to a huge variety,  from Lions to Dik-dik, laikipia has become a stronghold for the more unusual species including more than 70% of the world's remaining Grevy's zebra as well as other species including reticulated giraffe, Beisa oryx, zorilla, striped hyena, aardwolf, wild dog, and melanistic leopard. Large permanent herds of elephant, lion, leopard, spotted hyena, common zebra, warthog, hippo, buffalo, and many different antelope species. Our guides will help you identify and enjoy the plentiful (recorded 350) species of birds. Be sure to use your Laikipia Wilderness Booklet during your stay which has an extensive mammal and bird list for you to tick off.
texts.text: The wildlife in Laikipia is extraordinary. The area is still wild and largely unfenced, which enables game to move around the landscape, following the rains. Home to a huge variety,  from Lions to Dik-dik, laikipia has become a stronghold for the more unusual species including more than 70% of the world's remaining Grevy's zebra as well as other species including reticulated giraffe, Beisa oryx, zorilla, striped hyena, aardwolf, wild dog, and melanistic leopard. Large permanent herds of elephant, lion, leopard, spotted hyena, common zebra, warthog, hippo, buffalo, and many different antelope species. Our guides will help you identify and enjoy the plentiful (recorded 350) species of birds. Be sure to use your Laikipia Wilderness Booklet during your stay which has an extensive mammal and bird list for you to tick off.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: At times we have some of the most incredible wild dog sightings. One pack, in particular, has been monitored for over ten years. This was more recently named the 'Phoenix Pack' as they recovered from a severe outbreak of canine distemper in 2017. The wild dogs are not always in the immediate area, but they often hunt nearby and can be found daily at times. Chances of seeing them have been good and we are delighted to see the population expanding again. When booking your safari please check in with the reservations team about the best time for seeing wild dogs.
texts.text: At times we have some of the most incredible wild dog sightings. One pack, in particular, has been monitored for over ten years. This was more recently named the 'Phoenix Pack' as they recovered from a severe outbreak of canine distemper in 2017. The wild dogs are not always in the immediate area, but they often hunt nearby and can be found daily at times. Chances of seeing them have been good and we are delighted to see the population expanding again. When booking your safari please check in with the reservations team about the best time for seeing wild dogs.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Originally captured on camera by Will Burrard Lucas in 2019, Laikipia has become famous for sightings of black leopards. These melanistic cats are extremely rare and we are privileged to have them, one female was born and raised less than 100m from camp. She is seen fairly regularly and is especially relaxed around vehicles which provides us with the most impressive sightings. We are seeing her about 4 nights a week but she is a wild animal and can be unpredictable as a result.
texts.text: Originally captured on camera by Will Burrard Lucas in 2019, Laikipia has become famous for sightings of black leopards. These melanistic cats are extremely rare and we are privileged to have them, one female was born and raised less than 100m from camp. She is seen fairly regularly and is especially relaxed around vehicles which provides us with the most impressive sightings. We are seeing her about 4 nights a week but she is a wild animal and can be unpredictable as a result.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We limit the number of vehicles at a sighting and the amount of time spent with the leopard. Those with a Black Leopard private vehicle (BLPV) or a Black Leopard shared vehicle (BLSV) will be given one of the priority slots at a sightings. Please book and pay for your Black Leopard vehicle in advance. Single Photographers are encouraged to use the BLSV. Kindly note that all black leopard-focused drives will be restricted to 6 am and 8 pm respectively, in order to allow the leopard time to be a leopard. The spotlights have also been fitted with red filters. In case of any signs of stress, your guide has the right to end a sighting at any point. Kindly respect the leopard at all sightings. Black Leopard Private Vehicle is charged at $350 per night Black Leopard Shared Vehicle is charged at $100 per person per night (1 booking per row). This includes afternoon, evening and morning game drives, not transfers. Black leopard vehicles should be included at the start of your booking. If you do not feel the need for a BL vehicle but you would still like to be given the chance to see the black leopard then normal vehicles will be rotated into a sighting as/if/when there is space. For more information, please have a look at our website.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Booking a black leopard vehicle does not guarantee sightings as she is a wild animal. This is only for a priority slot at a sighting where the number of vehicles is limited. Not necessary for all guests.
